common.address: Ürgen Paşa Mah. 75. Yıl Bulvarı, Antakya / Hatay

about.title: Crafting Exceptional Interiors Since 1997
about.story_p1: Vitem was founded in 1997 in Hatay as Cansu Kapı, starting with a 350 m² workshop and 5 employees. Today it has grown into a respected brand with a 3,500 m² integrated production facility, a modern showroom, and 80 dedicated employees.
about.story_p2: The strength we derive from our family business identity is reflected in our production, enabling us to maintain total quality at the highest level. In every project, we work with a focused, detail-oriented approach that never compromises on quality.
about.philosophy_p1: We believe that your living space should be a reflection of who you are — your values, your aesthetic, your way of life. That is why we take a deeply personal approach to every project, working closely with our clients to understand their vision before we begin crafting.
about.philosophy_p2: Sustainability and quality are at the core of everything we do. We source our materials responsibly and employ techniques that ensure longevity, creating pieces that are not only beautiful but built to last for generations.

contact.title: Contact Us

collections.title: Our Collections
collections.description: Explore our curated collections of bespoke kitchens, architectural doors, and custom wardrobes — each designed to transform your living spaces.
collections.no_products: No products available in this collection yet.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.cta_title: Are you planning a similar project?
projects.cta_desc: Get in touch with our team and let us bring your vision to life together.

villa-bosphorus.name: Villa Bosphorus
villa-bosphorus.description: In this exclusive villa project overlooking the Istanbul Bosphorus, a unique living experience was created with modern minimalist lines and natural material choices. The open-plan kitchen and living space design provided a spacious, elegant environment suited to family dynamics.

aegean-retreat.name: Aegean Retreat
aegean-retreat.description: In this holiday villa located on the Aegean coast, a clean, elegant interior approach dominated by sea-blue and white tones was adopted. Water-resistant materials and a color palette suited to maritime aesthetics were used in the kitchen and bathroom projects.

urban-minimalist.name: Urban Minimalist
urban-minimalist.description: In this modern apartment project at the heart of the capital, a minimalist aesthetic was achieved with a grey-white color palette and matte cabinet selections. An intelligent design philosophy that delivers maximum storage within limited space was adopted.

heritage-estate.name: Heritage Estate
heritage-estate.description: Designed in harmony with Hatay's historical fabric, this estate project features warm tones and wooden textures inspired by Anatolian architectural motifs. A welcoming and functional interior plan suitable for extended family living was crafted.

farkimiz.title: Our Edge
farkimiz.description: Vitem combines quality, aesthetics and functionality to design living spaces that set you apart.
farkimiz.quality_desc: Every material used in production is carefully selected for quality and durability, manufactured with advanced technological systems.
farkimiz.design_desc: Every project is brought to life with a bespoke design approach that fits your space with tailor-made precision.
farkimiz.ergonomy_desc: All models are designed with an ergonomics-first mindset — less tiring to use, and every section easily accessible.
farkimiz.tech_desc: Our 3,500 m² production facility uses computer-controlled cutting and edge banding machines for flawless production.
farkimiz.service_desc: Our post-installation technical service ensures your products can be used without issues for many years.
farkimiz.experience_desc: Since 1997, we have successfully completed over 10,000 projects, reflecting our accumulated experience in every product.
farkimiz.process_title: A Seamless Journey from Project to Delivery
farkimiz.step1_desc: We visit your space on-site to identify your needs and take precise measurements.
farkimiz.step2_desc: Visualize your project with 3D rendering before delivery.
farkimiz.step3_desc: We carry out precision manufacturing in our 3,500 m² facility with CNC machines.
farkimiz.step4_desc: Our expert team completes installation and stays by your side for after-sales support.

referanslar.title: References
referanslar.description: Discover the experiences of thousands of our satisfied clients.

items.1_text: I was satisfied with every detail from start to finish. Most importantly, even the smallest issue we had was resolved immediately.
items.2_text: We received service far above our expectations in terms of quality material use and craftsmanship. I would definitely recommend it.
items.3_text: From design to delivery, they were a professional team. Our kitchen turned out both very stylish and extremely functional.
items.4_text: The Vitem team fully understood our vision and delivered a result beyond our dreams. Thank you!
items.5_text: Excellent value for money. Moreover, the installation team was very meticulous and paid attention to every detail.
items.6_text: Even though it was our second project, we see the same care and quality every time. We have practically become part of the Vitem family.

footer.brand_desc: Luxury kitchen, bathroom and living space solutions crafted in Hatay for the world.

philosophy.title: Where Anatolian Heritage Meets Contemporary Design
philosophy.p1: Founded in the heart of Hatay, Vitem represents a new standard in luxury interior design and furniture manufacturing. We blend centuries of Anatolian craftsmanship with cutting-edge contemporary design to create spaces that are both timeless and modern.
philosophy.p2: Every piece that leaves our workshop carries the imprint of meticulous attention to detail, from the selection of premium materials to the final hand-finished touches. We believe that true luxury lies in the harmony between form and function.

craftsmanship.title: Mastery in Every Detail
craftsmanship.desc: Our commitment to excellence begins long before the final piece is assembled. We source only the finest raw materials, blending cutting-edge precision technology with generations of artisanal expertise from Hatay. Every curve, joint, and surface is meticulously inspected to ensure absolute perfection.
